$schema_comment: RFC 8785 (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) interop test vectors for journal.ts canonicalJson(). Pinned in .harness-hash so any edit requires a hash re-init. Each entry has: name, input (parsed value), expected (canonical UTF-8 bytes as a string), and origin (which RFC 8785 section the case exercises). 'throws' entries assert canonicalJson rejects inputs outside our integer-only / BMP-only schema — documented narrower domain than full RFC 8785.

supported.name: string with newline
supported.origin: RFC 8785 §3.2.2.2 — U+000A must be escaped as \n

supported.name: string with tab
supported.origin: RFC 8785 §3.2.2.2 — U+0009 must be escaped as \t

supported.name: string with carriage return
supported.origin: RFC 8785 §3.2.2.2 — U+000D must be escaped as \r

supported.name: string with form feed
supported.origin: RFC 8785 §3.2.2.2 — U+000C must be escaped as \f

supported.name: string with backspace
supported.origin: RFC 8785 §3.2.2.2 — U+0008 must be escaped as \b

supported.name: string with NUL escaped as \u0000
supported.origin: RFC 8785 §3.2.2.2 — control chars without short form use \u00XX

supported.name: string with U+001F escaped
supported.origin: RFC 8785 §3.2.2.2 — last control char in the \u00XX range

supported.name: BMP non-ASCII string (German umlaut)
supported.origin: RFC 8785 §3.2.2.2 — non-ASCII BMP chars are NOT escaped

supported.name: object keys sorted by UTF-16 code-unit order — reverse input
object keys sorted — three keys in arbitrary input order
object keys sorted — ASCII case-sensitive (uppercase before lowercase)
supported.origin: RFC 8785 §3.2.3 — UTF-16 code-unit order, U+0041 (A) < U+0061 (a)

supported.name: object keys sorted — BMP umlaut sorts after ASCII
nested object — inner keys sorted independently
object in array — keys sorted inside elements, array order preserved
journal event shape — typed audit-log fixture
supported.origin: Synthetic — exercises the actual JournalEvent shape that ccsc-22l will sign

throws.name: non-integer number (positive)
throws.origin: Documented narrower domain — JournalEvent schema permits only integers

throws.name: non-integer number (negative)
throws.origin: Documented narrower domain — JournalEvent schema permits only integers

throws.name: non-finite number — Infinity
throws.origin: Documented narrower domain — non-finite throws at canonicalize time

throws.name: non-finite number — NaN
throws.origin: Documented narrower domain — non-finite throws at canonicalize time

throws.name: undefined value
throws.origin: Documented narrower domain — undefined is not valid JournalEvent content
